mapper.sql: select template_id as templateId, template_name as templateName, project_type as projectType, phase_name as phaseName, version_no as versionNo, directory_json as directoryJson, status, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, remark from inf_project_template
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_project_template where template_id in
#{templateId}
